panels.title: Engine Health
panels.description: Engine self-assessed health: 0=Healthy, 1=Degraded, 2=Unhealthy

panels.title: Liveness
panels.description: Blackbox probe of /api/v1/health/live — is the process running?

panels.title: Readiness
panels.description: Blackbox probe of /api/v1/health/ready — is the engine ready to accept work?

panels.title: Failures
panels.description: All failure signals: general errors, workflow/step/DB failures (rate/s), and maintenance consecutive failure count (right axis).

panels.title: Queue Fill
panels.description: Inbox queue utilization. At 100% the engine activates backpressure and rejects new work (429).

panels.title: Throughput
panels.description: Successful workflow completions per second (1m avg)

panels.title: Retries
panels.description: Combined workflow + step requeue rate per second (1m avg). Non-zero means commands are failing and being retried.

panels.title: Success Rate
panels.description: Percentage of completed workflows that succeeded (5m window)

panels.title: P95 Duration
panels.description: 95th percentile workflow end-to-end duration (5m window)

panels.title: Workflow Requests
panels.description: Rate of incoming workflow requests vs accepted (5m avg)

panels.title: Workflow Outcomes
panels.description: Rate of workflow completions by outcome (5m avg)

panels.title: Workflow Inventory
panels.description: Current workflow counts by state (gauge values over time)

panels.title: Workflow Duration (E2E)
panels.description: End-to-end workflow duration percentiles including queue and retry time

panels.title: Workflow Time Breakdown (P95)
panels.description: Where workflows spend their time: waiting in queue vs active execution (P95 stacked)

panels.title: Step Duration (E2E)
panels.description: End-to-end step duration percentiles including queue and retry time

panels.title: Worker Slots
panels.description: Worker concurrency slots: used vs total capacity

panels.title: DB Slots
panels.description: Database operation concurrency slots: used vs total capacity

panels.title: HTTP Slots
panels.description: HTTP call concurrency slots: used vs total capacity

panels.title: Inbox Slots
panels.description: Write buffer inbox slots: used vs total capacity

panels.title: Main Loop Rate
panels.description: Processing loop iterations per minute (5m avg)

panels.title: Main Loop Time (P95)
panels.description: How the main loop spends each iteration: waiting for work vs actively processing (P95 stacked)

panels.title: Database Operations
panels.description: Rate of database operations by outcome (5m avg)

panels.title: Step Execution
panels.description: Rate of step executions by outcome (5m avg)

panels.title: Errors & Recovery
panels.description: General error rate and stale workflow reclaims (crashed worker recovery)

panels.title: Step Time Breakdown (P95)
panels.description: Where steps spend their time: waiting in queue vs active execution (P95 stacked)

panels.title: Pool Utilization
panels.description: Npgsql connection pool: idle vs active connections. Stacked area shows total pool usage over time.

panels.title: Latency (P95 / P50)
panels.description: Npgsql connection creation time and command execution duration. High create time = network/PG issue. High command duration = slow queries.

panels.title: Connections & Pool Limits
panels.description: Currently executing commands, total open connections, and pool max boundary. Executing near pool limit = saturation.
